Hero.title:
Bridging Education with
Professional Foreign Teachers
Hero.detail:
High-quality teacher recruitment, visa support,
and English camp management.

Features.detail1: Recruitment, Management, English Camps, and Customized Curriculum Development.
Features.detail2: Seamless teaching experience with our reliable substitute teacher system.
Features.detail3: Every teacher is professionally trained by experts to ensure classroom performance.
Features.detail4: Hassle-free documentation. We handle all visas and work permits in one place.

AboutUs.title: About Us
AboutUs.detail: P&K Progressive English Co., Ltd. (PKP) provides comprehensive English language education services. The company specializes in recruiting high-quality native and non-native English-speaking teachers for schools across Thailand. All teachers are carefully selected and trained in teaching methodologies, child psychology, classroom management, and Thai cultural etiquette to ensure an effective and engaging learning experience for students.

Team.title: Our Foreign Teachers
Team.detail: We connect high-quality foreign teachers with the right schools, paying close attention to every detail—from rigorous selection to 100% comprehensive visa and documentation support. All of our educators undergo training in teaching skills and cultural etiquette to ensure a smooth, effective, and joyful learning experience for both teachers and students. Currently, we have a total of XX foreign teachers.
Team.trusted: Trusted by Educational Institutions and Partners
Team.more: In addition, we provide expert legal consultancy, covering Work Permit applications, Visa applications, and Visa Type conversions for employment. We ensure a hassle-free process and fully protect the rights and benefits of our foreign educators through our comprehensive care.
Team.reviewdetail: Your happiness is our priority. Discover the experiences of our international educators within the PKP family. From seamless visa processing to dedicated career support, hear why teachers from around the world trust us to be their partner in education here in Thailand.
